planets.name: Want
planets.summary: Archive cluster around want: 864 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Want receipt from 2022-03-02
artifacts.excerpt:
TIL: during the golden age of Athens, the city was about 0.7 sq miles, and held 75,000 people.

For perspective (pop/sq mile):
- (Ancient) Athens: 107,000
- Manhattan: 69,468
- LA: 8,499
- SF: 6,266

If we want a golden age, we should consider raising the density. A lot.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2023-03-20
artifacts.excerpt:
"BAD HABITS" DON'T EXIST.

YOU ARE NOT "LAZY".

BEHAVIORISM IS MADE UP.

YOUR BODY IS TRYING TO SOLVE PROBLEMS THAT YOU AREN'T RECOGNIZING.

WHAT ARE THEY?

ASK YOURSELF ABOUT YOUR OWN BEHAVIOR FROM SCRATCH, STOP LETTING POP SCIENCE ARTICLES TELL YOU WHAT YOU ARE.

WAKE UP

1. Soothing is a basic human need, you can't get rid of it. You can only meet the need.

2. Most of us are self-soothing, because we don't engage in any social soothing after moving away from home.

3. Self-soothing can be so distressing that it is often mislabeled "addiction"
